enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nenjam Ellam'?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Aayitha Ezhuthu'?

In the movie, the song represents the emotional turmoil and romantic connections between the characters.

Who are the singers of 'Nenjam Ellam'?

The song features the talented voices of Adnan Sami and Sujatha Mohan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Nenjam Ellam' was composed by the renowned AR Rahman.

When was 'Nenjam Ellam' released?

The song was released on May 21, 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nenjam Ellam, the characters navigate the intricate emotions of love and desire, making it a poignant moment in Aayitha Ezhuthu. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and yearning. With the powerful collaboration of Adnan Sami and Sujatha Mohan, listeners are drawn into a world of romantic introspection. This track beautifully encapsulates the essence of love, making it a timeless favorite.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nenjam Ellam from the Aayitha Ezhuthu soundtrack is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Adnan Sami and Sujatha Mohan, paired with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the emotional depth and lyrical brilliance that Vairamuthu brings to this timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Hey hey hey.. if you tell the truth, hey hey hey, will you love me?
If you say the truth, my heart is all love, my body is all desire, will you love me?
Oh love, reduce a bit of desire, a bit of sleep, will you accept me on the bed?
If you say the truth, will you love me? Will you accept me on the bed? (3)
Will you love me? (4)
There is a charm in women. I have only you as my pride.
When you look with your beautiful eyes, it strikes like lightning in my heart.
You are the rain cloud for me. My hormones rise like a river.
From now on, who will ask us? We will live for ourselves.
If you say the truth, will you love me? Will you accept me on the bed? (2)
If you say the truth, my heart is all love, my body is all desire, will you love me?
Oh love, reduce a bit of desire, a bit of sleep, will you accept me on the bed?
Love comes to me every year. Your desire steals me every time.
All my thoughts are pathways, all my dreams are like stars.
My sky is in my home, my earth is not in my home.
I do not know your secrets, if I knew, there would be no purity in the sun.
Hey hey hey.. if you tell the truth, hey hey hey, will you love me?
If you say the truth, my heart is all love, my body is all desire, will you love me?
Oh love, reduce a bit of desire, a bit of sleep, will you accept me on the bed?
If you say the truth, will you love me? Will you accept me on the bed? ..
All thoughts are pathways, all dreams are like stars...
